description: Alice sends one long run-on paragraph containing all scheduling details with no punctuation breaks. Product roadmap sync on Tuesday at 3 PM for 2 hours in the glass-wall meeting room.

events.title: Product Roadmap Sync
events.reasoning: Despite the run-on paragraph format, Alice clearly specifies Tuesday at 3 PM in the glass-wall meeting room on the second floor for a 2-hour product roadmap sync. Dave confirms all details.
events.assumptions: End time is 5 PM based on Alice's explicit '2 hours'. Location described as 'big meeting room on the second floor the one with the glass walls' = glass-wall meeting room.

mock_llm_response.summary: Found 1 event: product roadmap sync on Tuesday at 3 PM for 2 hours in the glass-wall meeting room with Alice and Dave.

notes: Reference datetime is Friday 2026-02-20. Tuesday = 2026-02-24. Challenge: parsing scheduling details from a single unpunctuated run-on message. All details present but require extraction from stream-of-consciousness prose.
